rationale: Review 2's sole finding is real (the public `antipode_convMul_id` claims `TauCeti.HopfAlgebra` inside AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean and is used only internally at convInv_mul_cancel) and material to placement; acting on it yields a cleanly scoped PR with no other changes needed. Review 1's core placement diagnosis (file and 8 decls must be split into Bialgebra/ and HopfAlgebra/ subdirs) misreads the diff+docstring intent (this file deliberately realizes the Layer-0 functor-of-points milestone and its `instGroup`/`mapValue`), so acting on it forces needless churn and an unneeded new decl.
